title: Quesadilla Filling with Mediterranean Twist
description: A flavorful quesadilla filling made with a hint of Mediterranean spices and a tangy kick from mustardy sauce.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
In a bowl, mix together enchilada sauce, mustardy sauce, and chopped olives.
Add shredded cheese to the bowl and stir until combined.
Place a tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle a quarter of the cheese mixture onto half of the tortilla.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2 minutes or until the other side is crispy.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients and serve hot.
